arts.ttl: Why Declan Rice should be dropped vs Man Utd as Arsenal unleash new Martin Odegaard partner
arts.sum: Lewis-Skelly is well suited to playing in midfield and could start there on Sunday in place of Thomas Partey or even Declan Rice just to keep things fresh . Unlike Manchester United, whose season relies solely on Thursday night's Europa League last-16 second leg at Old Trafford, Arsenal can rest easy.

arts.ttl: Arsenal set to open talks for star with 80 goals in his last three seasons
arts.sum: Arsenal are looking to improve their attacking unit during the summer transfer window and they are looking at Inter Milan striker Lautaro Martinez as a potential option. arts.ttl: Club make last minute move to steal appointment from Arsenal – Gunners have ‘long established contact’
arts.sum: AC Milan are planning a last-minute attempt to try and hire director of football Andrea Bert and keep him out of Arsenal’s hands. That’s according to Corriere della Sera, relayed by Tuttomercatoweb, who cover the situation around in the in-demand director today. arts.sum: Red-hot Man Utd rumour opens up PERFECT chance for Jonathan David Manchester United hold the key to opening the door for Canada ace Jonathan David to make his perfect move in the summer transfer window – but that would not be to Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Man Utd Transfer News: Ruben Amorim 'impressed' with €40m Geovany Quenda alternative Roger Fernandes
arts.sum: Manchester United are keeping tabs on Braga youngster Roger Fernandes as a potential alternative to Geovany Quenda, according to a report. According to Graeme Bailey, Man Utd scouts have been left very impressed with Braga youngster Roger Fernandes.

arts.ttl: Liverpool Make Contact With £50m-Rated Striker After Gaining an ‘Edge on Arsenal’
arts.sum: Liverpool are interested in RB Leipzig striker Benjamin Sesko, who is also a target for Arsenal. Arne Slot is eager to replace Darwin Nunez.
